positioning: Anchrix is the essential AI-powered identity verification and regulatory compliance platform tailored for fintech startups. We simplify KYC/AML processes with our single API solution that integrates biometric verification, comprehensive document authentication, and real-time regulatory monitoring, significantly reducing compliance costs and onboarding times.
value_props: AI-powered biometric verification for fast and accurate identity checks.
Comprehensive document authentication for diverse ID types.
Real-time regulatory monitoring across federal and state regulations.
Single API solution for seamless KYC/AML compliance.
Reduces compliance costs by 80% and onboarding time to minutes.
icp: Fintech startups in Seed to Series-B stages seeking cost-effective, efficient identity verification and compliance solutions without the need for a full compliance team.

landing_page.hero_headline: Transform Your Compliance Process with AI-Powered Verification
landing_page.hero_subheadline: Cut costs and onboarding time with Anchrix’s seamless KYC/AML solutions.

features_section.title: Biometric Verification
features_section.description: Utilize cutting-edge AI for accurate face and liveness detection.

features_section.title: Document Authentication
features_section.description: Verify passports, driver's licenses, and utility bills effortlessly.

features_section.title: Regulatory Monitoring
features_section.description: Stay compliant with real-time updates across CFPB, FinCEN, SEC, and state regulations.

features_section.title: Single API Solution
features_section.description: Seamless integration with automatic updates for KYC/AML compliance.

landing_page.social_proof: Trusted by innovative fintech startups across the globe.

faq.question: How does Anchrix reduce compliance costs?
faq.answer: Our AI solutions automate verification processes, reducing the need for a large compliance team, thus lowering costs by 80%.

faq.question: What types of documents can Anchrix authenticate?
faq.answer: Anchrix can authenticate a variety of documents including passports, driver's licenses, and utility bills.

faq.question: How does Anchrix ensure regulatory compliance?
faq.answer: Anchrix provides real-time monitoring of regulatory changes across CFPB, FinCEN, SEC, and state regulations, ensuring you stay compliant.

launch_plan.action: Develop and launch a comprehensive LinkedIn ad campaign targeting fintech founders and compliance officers.
Host a webinar featuring industry experts discussing compliance challenges and solutions.
Publish a series of blog posts and case studies highlighting the benefits of AI in compliance.
Participate in a fintech industry conference to network and showcase Anchrix.
Establish partnerships with fintech accelerators to gain access to startups in need of compliance solutions.
